---
name: clone-site
description: "Clone the visual structure and copy of a public website to use as a reference or starting point for landing-page work. Use when asked to 'clone this site', 'rebuild this landing page', 'mirror this layout', or to extract HTML/CSS/copy patterns from a competitor."
argument-hint: "URL of the site to clone"
---

# Clone Site (adapter)

Source skill: [`clone-site/`](../../../clone-site/) — see
[`clone-site/SKILL.md`](../../../clone-site/SKILL.md) for the full procedure
and references under [`clone-site/references/`](../../../clone-site/references/).

## When to use

- Recreating a competitor's hero section as a baseline for autoresearch
- Pulling copy, layout, and asset structure from a site for a CRO audit
- Bootstrapping a landing page in the same visual idiom as a reference

## When not to use

- Directly republishing trademarked content
- Scraping authenticated or rate-limited content without permission
